resources.string: Enter the poll URL. While the screen is on and Wi-Fi is connected, the app checks it about once a minute and shows any puzzle it returns.
Fallback poll URL (optional). If the main URL errors, the next minute checks this one instead, then returns to the main URL.
Send the current app to the background when a puzzle appears
Auto-dismiss a puzzle if the screen stays off this many minutes (0 = never)
